sections.sectionTitle: Kisik Ding, ahih kei leh Si Ding

verses.text: Tua laitakin tua lai-a om mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, Galilee mite in Pasian kiangah biakna pia-in a om laitakin Pilat in a thah mite' thu a gen uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tua bangin hih Galilee mite kithat ahih manin, Galilee midangte khempeuh sangin hih a kithat mite a mawhna uh lianzaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam
Hilo hi. Ke'n kong cihin-ah, na mawhna panun na kisik kei uh leh amaute mah bangin note zong na si ding uh hi

Tua ahih kei leh, Siloam Tuibeem gei-a tausang a puk lai-in a den'lup mi sawmlegiatte bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Hih bangin a sih manun Jerusalem khuasunga a teng midangte sangin a mawhna uh lianzaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam
Hilo hi. Ke'n kong cihin-ah, na mawhna panun na kisikkik kei uh leh note zong amaute mah bangin na si ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in a lolai-ah theikung khat a suansak hi. Theigah a lo dingin a pai ciangin bangmah na gahlo hi

Tua ahih manin amah in a lokhopa kiangah, ‘A beisa kum thum sung theigah lo dingin ka pai zelzel a, ahi zongin gahlo hi. Tua ahih manin phuk in. Bang hangin lo sung mawk nawngkaisak ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi
Tua ciangin lokhopa in, ‘Topa aw, tu kum sung zong hih bangmahin omsaklai phot in. A phung kimkot to-in eklei ka sung ding hi
Kum kik ciangin hong gah leh a hoih hi pah ding hi. Ahi zongin hong gah kei veve leh i phuk ding hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Sabbath Ni-in Nungkul Numei Khat Kidamsak

verses.text: Sabbath ni khatin Jesuh in kikhopna inn khat sungah thu hilhin a om hi
Dawivei numei khat tua lai-ah om a, tua dawi in kum sawmlegiat sung tua numei cina sakin a nung kulsak a, dingtang thei hetloin a om hi
Jesuh in tua numei a muh ciangin a kiangah sam a, “Lawm aw, na natna panin na damta hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin numei tungah a khut nga a, thakhat thu-in amah dingtang thei-in Pasian a phatpah hi

Ahi zongin Jesuh in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin kikhopna inn ukpa a heh suak a, mite kiangah, “Na a kisep theihna ding hun ni guk sung om hi. Tua hun sungin hong pai-in kidamsak un la, ahi zongin Sabbath ni-in hong pai kei un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in amah dawng a, “No a kineihkhem mite aw, note in Sabbath ni mahin zong na bawngte uh ahi a, na late uh ahi zongin a buk panin na khihna khaute uh sutin, tui pia dingin paipih hilo na hi uh hiam
Tua mah bangin Satan in Abraham' suante khat ahi hih numei pen kum sawmlegiat sung hencip hi. Hih a kihencipna panin Sabbath ni-in hih numei khahkhiat ding kilawm hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Hih Jesuh' dawn'na in alangte khempeuh maizumsak a, Jesuh' sep hih na lamdangte khempeuh hangin midang khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna bang tawh kibang a, bang tawh genteh ding ka hi hiam cih leh
Mi khat in a lo-ah a vawh ankam tang khat tawh kibang hi. Tua ankam tang hong khangin kung golpi hong suak a, vasate in a hiang tungah bu a tom thei uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna bang tawh genteh leuleu ding ka hi hiam cih leh
Nupi khat in annel lom sungah a sawh silngo tawh kibang hi. Tua silngo in a annel lom khempeuh a pawmsak hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin khuapite leh khuaneute nawkin Jesuh paisuak a, Jerusalem khua manawhin a paikawmin thu a hilh hi
Tua laitakin mi khat in, “Siapa aw, hotkhiatna a ngah mi tawmno khat bek hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kong kawcik tawnin na lutna dingun hanciam un. Note kiangah kong genin-ah, mi tampi tak in lut ding a hanciam uh hangin lut zolo ding uh hi

Inn neipa hong tho-in kong hong khak ciangin, note kong pualamah dingin kongkhak na kiu ding uh a, ‘Topa aw, kote zong kong hong hon' in,’ na ci ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Note koilai panin a hong pai na hi uh hiam kong thei kei hi,’ ci-in hong dawng ding hi
Note in, ‘Nangmah tawh anne tuidawn khawmin i om a, ka khuasung uhah thu nong hilh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in, ‘Note koi panin a hong pai cih kong thei kei hi. A giloin a gamta note khempeuh aw, kei kiang panin paikhia un,’ hong ci ding hi

Pasian' Ukna sungah Abraham, Isaac, Jakob, leh kamsangte khempeuh a omna mu napi-in, note a pualamah hong kihawlkhiat ciangin tua huna na kahna uh leh na ha gawina uh bangzah takin nasia ding ahi hiam
Nisuahna leh nitumna, leilu leh leitaw lam panin mite hong pai-in Pasian' Ukna sung sabuai kiimah tukhawm ding uh hi
Tua hi a, tuhuna mineute tuahun ciangin milian hi ding a, tuhuna miliante tuahun ciangin mineu hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tuahun laitakin Farisi mi pawlkhat hong pai-in Jesuh kiangah, “Herod in nang thah hong sawm ahih manin hih lai panin mun dang khatah paikhia in,” a ci uh hi

Jesuh in, “Pai un la, ngia bangin ngian a zang tua Herod kiangah hih bangin va gen un: ‘Tuni leh zing ciang sung dawi hawlkhia-in cina ka damsak ding a, thai ciangin ka nasep ka man ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci un
Ahi zongin tuni, zing leh thai sungteng ka ma nawtsuakin ka pai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khuasung lobuang mun dangah kamsangpa a kithah ding kilawmlo hi
“Jerusalem, Jerusalem aw, kamsangte na that a, Pasian' hong sawl kamtaite na denglum hi. Akpi in a kha tawh a note a huai mah bangin na mite ka huainuam tawntung a, ahi zongin na ut kei hi
Tu-in na innte kinusiacip ding hi. ‘Topa min tawh a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen,’ na cih hun hong tun' matengin kei nong mu nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
